topic: Adrenal fatigue is fake — but cortisol dysregulation is real
caption: Did you know that adrenal fatigue might not be the real culprit behind your exhaustion? 🌟 Save this post to learn how cortisol dysregulation could be the root cause of your fatigue. 💡 Share with someone who's struggling with energy crashes. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health insights. Don't forget to prioritize your cortisol balance — your body will thank you! 🙏💖 #cortisolbalance #adrenalfatigue #hormonehealth #energyboost #wellness
